prompt: 先生の指示___行動してください。
optionsJson: ["に従って","に対して","によって","にとって"]
explanation: に従って (in accordance with / following) — please act in accordance with the teacher's instructions.

prompt: 彼は自分が正しい___、謝らなかった。
optionsJson: ["と思って","と言って","と聞いて","と見て"]
explanation: と思って (thinking that ~) — thinking that he was right, he didn't apologize.

prompt: 試合で負けて___、くやしくて泣いてしまった。
optionsJson: ["しまって","みて","おいて","きて"]
explanation: てしまって (having ~ed — regret/completion) — having lost the match, I was so frustrated I cried.

prompt: 彼女はドアを開けた___、部屋に入らなかった。
optionsJson: ["まま","ので","から","ために"]
explanation: たまま (while still in the state of ~) — she opened the door and left it open (didn't enter the room).

prompt: 昨日は傘を持た___外出した。
optionsJson: ["ずに","ないで","なくて","なしに"]
explanation: ずに (without ~ing) — yesterday I went out without bringing an umbrella.

prompt: 彼はゲーム___、勉強しない。
optionsJson: ["ばかりして","だけして","のみして","さえして"]
explanation: てばかりいる (doing nothing but ~) — he does nothing but play games and doesn't study.

prompt: このパズルが気になって___。
optionsJson: ["しかたがない","たまらない","ならない","いけない"]
explanation: てしかたがない (can't help feeling ~ / extremely ~) — I can't stop being curious about this puzzle.

prompt: 夏の暑さが辛くて___。
optionsJson: ["たまらない","しかたがない","いられない","いけない"]
explanation: てたまらない (unbearably ~ / can't stand ~) — the summer heat is unbearably tough.

prompt: 次回の会議の日程を___もらえますか。
optionsJson: ["教えて","教えさせて","教えられて","教えてあげて"]
explanation: てもらえますか (could you please ~?) — could you please tell me the schedule for the next meeting?

promptFull: プレゼンを___もらいたい。
prompt: プレゼンを___もらいたい。
optionsJson: ["させて","させられて","させ","させられ"]
explanation: させてもらう (let me do ~ / allow me to do ~) — I would like to be allowed to give the presentation.

prompt: 私は上司に残業___。
optionsJson: ["させられた","させた","されられた","してもらった"]
explanation: させられる (be made to do ~) — I was made to work overtime by my boss.

prompt: 彼女の振る舞いは本物の女優___。
optionsJson: ["らしい","みたいだ","ようだ","そうだ"]
explanation: らしい (typical of / befitting) — her behavior is typical of a real actress.

prompt: 彼女の様子から、とても幸せ___。
optionsJson: ["みたいだ","らしい","そうだ","ようだ"]
explanation: みたいだ (looks like / seems like — casual) — from the way she looks, she seems very happy.

prompt: 空が暗くなってきた。雨が降り___。
optionsJson: ["そうだ","ようだ","みたいだ","らしい"]
explanation: そうだ (looks like it's about to ~) — the sky has gotten dark. It looks like it's going to rain.

prompt: ニュースに___、大きな地震があったそうだ。
optionsJson: ["よると","よって","対して","従って"]
explanation: によると (according to) — according to the news, there was apparently a large earthquake.

prompt: 彼は必ず来る___。連絡があったから。
optionsJson: ["はずだ","わけだ","ものだ","ようだ"]
explanation: はずだ (should / expected to) — he should definitely come. Because he was in contact.

prompt: 彼女が怒るのも___。そんなひどいことを言われたら。
optionsJson: ["わけだ","はずだ","ものだ","ようだ"]
explanation: わけだ (that explains why / naturally) — no wonder she's angry. She was said something that terrible.

prompt: 彼は絶対に嘘をつかない___。信頼できる人だ。
optionsJson: ["に違いない","はずがない","わけがない","ようがない"]
explanation: に違いない (must be / certainly) — he must certainly never lie. He's a trustworthy person.

prompt: 地域___異なる文化が存在する。
optionsJson: ["によって","にとって","に対して","として"]
explanation: によって (depending on / by) — different cultures exist depending on the region.

prompt: 若者___、最新の技術に興味を持つ人が多い。
optionsJson: ["の中には","にとって","に対して","によって"]
explanation: の中には (among ~) — among young people, there are many who are interested in the latest technology.

prompt: 問題___積極的に取り組む姿勢が大事だ。
optionsJson: ["に対して","にとって","によって","として"]
explanation: に対して (toward / in response to) — an attitude of actively tackling problems is important.

prompt: この研究は医学の発展___貢献するだろう。
explanation: に貢献する (contribute to ~) — this research will probably contribute to the development of medicine.

prompt: その知らせを聞いて、信じられ___。
optionsJson: ["なかった","ないだった","なくだった","ずだった"]
explanation: 信じられなかった (couldn't believe) — I couldn't believe it when I heard that news.

prompt: 長い間会って___、彼女は全然変わっていなかった。
optionsJson: ["いなかったのに","いたのに","いたから","いないから"]
explanation: のに (despite / even though) — even though we hadn't seen each other for a long time, she hadn't changed at all.

prompt: 仕事が終わり___、映画を見に行った。
explanation: 次第 (as soon as ~) — as soon as work was done, I went to see a movie.

prompt: 最近、太り___で、ダイエットを始めた。
optionsJson: ["気味","がち","っぽい","すぎ"]
explanation: 気味 (slight tendency toward ~) — lately I've been tending to gain weight, so I started dieting.

prompt: 彼女は約束を守ら___で、信用できない。
optionsJson: ["ないがち","ないき","ないみ","なさがち"]
explanation: がち (tends to not ~ / prone to failing to ~) — she tends not to keep promises, so she can't be trusted.

prompt: 先生___聞けば、きっとわかる。
explanation: に聞く (ask ~) — if you ask the teacher, you'll surely understand.

prompt: この店は高い___、サービスもよくない。
explanation: し〜し (and also / listing complaints) — this store is expensive and the service isn't good either.

prompt: 頭が痛い___、熱もある___、今日は病院に行く。
explanation: し〜し (and moreover ~, listing multiple reasons) — I have a headache and also a fever, so I'll go to the hospital today.

prompt: 彼は走りな___、音楽を聴いている。
optionsJson: ["がら","つつ","まま","ばかり"]
explanation: ながら (while doing ~) — he is listening to music while running.

prompt: 本当のことを知り___、黙っていた。
optionsJson: ["ながら","つつ","まま","ばかりで"]
explanation: ながら (while / even though — for contrasting situations) — even though knowing the truth, I stayed silent.

prompt: 会議は予定通りに行われた___、問題は起きなかった。
explanation: ので (because / since) — because the meeting proceeded as scheduled, no problems arose.

prompt: 新幹線___大阪に行くと、2時間で着く。
optionsJson: ["を通して","によって","で","に乗って"]
explanation: で (by means of / using) — if you go to Osaka by Shinkansen, you arrive in 2 hours.

prompt: 彼は仕事のストレス___、体を壊してしまった。
optionsJson: ["せいで","おかげで","ために","によって"]
explanation: せいで (because of ~ [negative result]) — because of work stress, he ruined his health.

prompt: コーチの指導の___、選手たちが成長できた。
optionsJson: ["おかげで","せいで","ために","のに"]
explanation: おかげで (thanks to ~ [positive]) — thanks to the coach's guidance, the players were able to grow.

prompt: 彼女のアドバイス___、問題が解決できた。
optionsJson: ["によって","のために","として","のせいで"]
explanation: によって (by means of / through) — the problem was solved through her advice.

prompt: 国際交流___、異文化への理解が深まる。
optionsJson: ["を通して","によって","として","に対して"]
explanation: を通して (through / via) — through international exchange, understanding of other cultures deepens.

prompt: 彼が失敗した。だから、結果が悪かったのも___。
optionsJson: ["わけだ","はずだ","ものだ","こそだ"]
explanation: わけだ (that explains why / no wonder) — he failed. That's why the result was bad — no wonder.

prompt: そんなことを言うべきでは___。
optionsJson: ["なかった","なかっただ","なくだった","なかっただろう"]
explanation: べきではなかった (should not have ~) — you should not have said such a thing.

prompt: 今から行っても、もう間に合わない___。
optionsJson: ["に違いない","はずがない","わけがない","ものがない"]
explanation: に違いない (certainly / must be) — even if we go now, we certainly won't make it in time.

prompt: この量を一人で食べられる___。
optionsJson: ["わけがない","はずがない","に違いない","ものだ"]
explanation: わけがない (there's no way that ~ / impossible) — there's no way one person can eat this much.

prompt: 彼女に___ことは絶対にできない。
optionsJson: ["嘘をつく","嘘つく","嘘をつける","嘘つける"]
explanation: わけにはいかない context — I absolutely cannot tell a lie to her.

prompt: 日本語の勉強は難し___、楽しい。
optionsJson: ["いけど","くなく","くない","くなって"]
explanation: いけど (it's ~, but) — studying Japanese is difficult, but it's fun.

prompt: 海外旅行に行く___、パスポートが必要だ。
optionsJson: ["には","ために","ので","のに"]
explanation: には (in order to / for ~) — to travel abroad, a passport is necessary.

prompt: 彼女の日本語は、まるで日本人___だ。
optionsJson: ["のよう","らしい","そう","みたい"]
explanation: のようだ (just like ~ / as if) — her Japanese is just like that of a native Japanese speaker.

prompt: もし明日晴れ___、ピクニックに行こう。
explanation: なら (if) — if it's sunny tomorrow, let's go on a picnic.

prompt: このボタンを押す___、電源が入る。
explanation: と (when you do ~, automatically ~) — when you press this button, it turns on.

prompt: もっとゆっくり話してくれ___、わかる。
optionsJson: ["れば","ると","るなら","るから"]
explanation: ば (if ~) — if you speak more slowly, I can understand.

prompt: 彼に話し___ことにした。
optionsJson: ["てみる","ておく","てくる","てしまう"]
explanation: てみる (try doing ~) — I decided to try talking to him.

prompt: 旅行の前に、チケットを予約して___ました。
optionsJson: ["おき","あり","おり","しまい"]
explanation: ておく (do in advance) — before the trip, I had reserved tickets (in advance).

prompt: 電車に乗り遅れて___、会議に遅刻した。
optionsJson: ["しまって","みて","おいて","くれて"]
explanation: てしまって (having ~ed accidentally / regret) — having missed the train, I was late for the meeting.

prompt: 将来のことを考える___、不安になってしまう。
explanation: と (whenever ~ / when ~, natural result) — whenever I think about the future, I get anxious.

prompt: 彼女が来た___、パーティーを始めましょう。
explanation: たら (when ~ / once ~) — once she arrives, let's start the party.

prompt: 子供の頃、よく川で魚を___ものだ。
optionsJson: ["釣った","釣る","釣り","釣って"]
explanation: たものだ (used to do ~ / reminiscing) — when I was a child, I used to fish in the river.

prompt: 努力すれ___、夢は必ず叶う。
explanation: ば (if ~) — if you make an effort, your dream will definitely come true.

prompt: この授業は難しい___、面白い内容が多い。
explanation: が (but / although) — this class is difficult, but it has a lot of interesting content.

prompt: この仕事は私には無理___ない。
explanation: ではない (it is not the case that ~) — it's not that this work is impossible for me.

prompt: 彼女の実力___、絶対に優勝できる。
explanation: なら (if it's ~, given ~) — given her ability, she can definitely win.

prompt: 彼はいつも人の話を聞か___、批判ばかりする。
optionsJson: ["ずに","ないで","なくて","ないから"]
explanation: ずに (without ~ing) — without ever listening to others, he does nothing but criticize.

prompt: あの映画を見て、感動せ___にはいられなかった。
explanation: ずにはいられない (cannot help but ~) — I couldn't help but be moved watching that movie.

prompt: この問題は解か___にはいられない。
explanation: ずにはいられない (cannot help but ~) — I cannot help but solve this problem.

prompt: 彼女は疲れている___で、もう寝てしまった。
optionsJson: ["よう","らしい","みたい","そう"]
explanation: ようだ (seems like / appears that) — it seems she was tired, so she already went to sleep.

prompt: 毎年この時期になる___、花粉症がひどくなる。
explanation: と (when ~ / whenever ~, natural result) — whenever this time of year comes, my hay fever gets worse.

prompt: もっと早く相談して___よかった。
optionsJson: ["おけば","みれば","しまえば","くれば"]
explanation: ておけばよかった (I should have done ~ in advance) — I should have consulted you earlier.

prompt: 人口が増える___、資源の需要も増える。
optionsJson: ["につれて","にとって","によって","に対して"]
explanation: につれて (as ~ / in proportion to) — as the population increases, demand for resources also increases.

prompt: 経済の発展___、環境問題も深刻化している。
optionsJson: ["とともに","につれて","によって","として"]
explanation: とともに (along with / together with) — along with economic development, environmental problems are also becoming serious.

prompt: 彼女は英語の先生___、英語が話せない。
optionsJson: ["のくせに","にしては","なのに","くせに"]
explanation: のくせに (despite being ~ / even though ~ [mild criticism]) — despite being an English teacher, she can't speak English.

prompt: 日本で長く生活した___、日本文化をよく理解できるようになった。
optionsJson: ["ことで","ことから","ことに","ことが"]
explanation: ことで (by / through ~ing) — by living in Japan for a long time, I came to understand Japanese culture well.

prompt: この映画は感動的___、何度見ても飽きない。
explanation: で (because of being ~) — because this movie is moving, I never get tired of watching it.

prompt: 彼は政治___、全く興味がない。
optionsJson: ["に対して","にとって","について","によって"]
explanation: に対して (toward / regarding) — he has absolutely no interest in politics.

prompt: 山田さんから___、パーティーの日時が変わったそうだ。
optionsJson: ["聞いたところ","聞くところ","聞いたから","聞くたびに"]
explanation: 聞いたところ (when I asked / upon asking) — when I asked Mr. Yamada, apparently the date and time of the party has changed.

prompt: 一生懸命やった___、うまくいかなかった。
explanation: のに (even though / despite) — even though I tried my hardest, it didn't go well.

prompt: 彼女は演技がうまい___、歌も上手だ。
optionsJson: ["うえに","のに","なのに","ながら"]
explanation: 上に (in addition to / on top of) — in addition to being good at acting, she is also a good singer.

prompt: 電話番号を知らない___、連絡できない。
explanation: ので (because) — because I don't know the phone number, I can't contact them.

prompt: 忙し___も、健康管理は大切だ。
optionsJson: ["くて","いでも","くても","くなら"]
explanation: くても (even if ~ / even though ~) — even if you're busy, taking care of your health is important.

prompt: 雨が降っ___、試合は続けられた。
optionsJson: ["ても","のに","くても","から"]
explanation: ても (even though / even if) — even though it rained, the match continued.

prompt: あの店___、また行きたいな。
explanation: に行く (go to ~) — I want to go to that store again.
